question.label: Impact in practice
question.name: Can you walk me through one decision from the last quarter where your work changed an outcome?
question.description: Surfaces a concrete example of leverage rather than general claims of contribution.

answer: I tend to wait until analysis is complete before socializing direction.

assessment.note: She names a specific pattern of holding back until analysis is complete, which weakens proactive influence and signals mild clarity risk around when to engage stakeholders.

new_queue.label: Wait-until-complete
new_queue.name: When you wait until analysis is complete, what are you trying to avoid?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Tradeoff pattern
new_queue.name: What do you usually trade off first when pressure rises?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to do differently in the next two weeks?
